load_bearing_cluster_roots.why_cluster_root: The pattern layer already has an executable deliverables standard, builder, validation report, route coverage, and tests. It should become the pattern-row binding grammar root.
The option-surface band contract is the strongest routing pattern shared across navigation, standards, paper modules, skills, and generated kind projections.

Entry-runtime behavior rows share one invariant: cold-start control packets can compress aggressively only when standards, paper modules, tests, diagnostics, and route-lease telemetry preserve the control floor.

Agent-runtime observability rows are all membranes around private traces: they project metadata, shape manual trace exports, project operator HUD tails without backfill, reduce noisy mission status, bound automatic hooks, replay hook interventions before trusting them, and audit final response egress. The public form must be synthetic, but the macro authority is code, standards, command surfaces, generated indexes, and focused tests.

Operator thread-memory rows share one privacy membrane: browser/Type B state may become durable only as private event logs, metadata-only continuation and handoff packets, confidence-banded Type B-to-Type A edges, or advisory lesson candidates. The public shape must use synthetic threads and rollouts; macro authority is the private event projector, metadata-only command surfaces, Prompt/Task/Agent trace standards, organ fixture specs, and focused tests.

World-model attention and authority rows share one projection boundary: backend code composes durable substrate into read-only Station/API handles, drift aggregates, and authority chains while standards constrain UI receipts and primitive view contracts. Tests and HTTP routes are more authoritative than any prose-only cockpit description.
Paper modules are not just prose: std_paper_module_v8, builder sidecars, route coverage, and tests make doctrine browseable and checkable.
Concurrent-agent safety becomes real at the claim, preflight, scoped commit, and finalizer surfaces.
Durable work, cap economy, capture-before-prose, and closeout propagation all converge on Task Ledger as state authority.

The current public route is the accepted bounded Lean/Lake proof-witness organ with a standard, paper module, redacted receipts, and negative cases. The older Erdos257 strike remains private-root prior art, not the reusable public Microcosm binding.
Dispatch, yield, heartbeat, continuation packets, and resume policy bind agent continuity to disk instead of chat memory.
Raw seed, atomization, enrichment, shard routing, and doctrine population motivate many high-novelty rows, but public projection must use synthetic fixtures.

The proof-search rows are not merely doctrine: they have executable factory commands, focused tests, run artifacts, and explicit anti-leakage reports. They should route as a proof-policy integrity cluster.

The market rows share one refusal-first evidence stack: feed lanes produce typed observations, readiness gates constrain cross-feed claims, situation graphs carry evidence and counterevidence, and time anchors make cross-lane comparison coherent.

These rows share one formal-prover invariant: provider-visible context, retrieval, strategy selection, library-prior admission, tactic availability, and corpus readiness are all control gates before proof success can be claimed. The authoritative evidence is mostly code plus run artifacts, so the cluster root prevents isolated pattern names from projecting without reducer, artifact, and anti-leakage refs.

pattern_bindings.fixture_strategy: Use three synthetic mutation proposals. Red: semantic, private, policy, irreversible, high-blast, or inconclusive proposal emits decision_needed, why_machine_gate_failed, blast_radius, recommended_action, safe_fallback, evidence, and disconfirming_check without applying.
